name: Apple Pie in the Bag
recipeInstructions:
Combine 1/2 cup sugar, 2 tablespoons flour, 1/2 teaspoon nutmeg, and a dash of cinnamon in a small bowl. Peel and quarter the apples, then stir the spice mixture into the apples.
Place the apple mixture into the unbaked pie shell. Stir together the topping ingredients in another small bowl.
Cover the apple filling with the topping mixture. Place the entire pie in a brown paper bag and secure the opening with paper clips (metal ones, not plastic). Put the bag on a cookie sheet for stability.
Bake in a 425 degree Fahrenheit oven for one hour. Carefully open the bag and let cool before serving.
